description: 14 spiritual pillar elevators — TFC¹ layer texts for the unified command dashboard

elevators.title: Emerald Tablets of Thoth
elevators.excerpt: As above, so below; as within, so without.

elevators.title: Book of Enoch
elevators.excerpt: And the angels, the children of heaven, saw and lusted after them.

elevators.title: Judas · Mary Magdalene · Lost Books
elevators.excerpt: The kingdom is inside of you, and it is outside of you.

elevators.title: Astrology Texts
elevators.excerpt: The stars incline, they do not compel.

elevators.title: The Iliad
elevators.excerpt: Sing, O goddess, the anger of Achilles son of Peleus.

elevators.title: The Odyssey
elevators.excerpt: Tell me, O muse, of that ingenious hero who travelled far and wide.

elevators.title: Percy Jackson Series
elevators.excerpt: Half-blood — the bridge between mortal and divine.

elevators.title: Bulgarian Bible
elevators.excerpt: In the beginning was the Word.

elevators.title: The Quran
elevators.excerpt: Read in the name of your Lord who created.

elevators.title: Lotus Texts of Mahayana Buddhism
elevators.excerpt: All beings will ultimately attain Buddhahood.

elevators.title: Tibetan Book of the Dead
elevators.excerpt: Recognize the clear light — the natural state of mind.

elevators.title: The Kybalion
elevators.excerpt: The All is Mind; the Universe is Mental.

elevators.title: Popol Vuh
elevators.excerpt: This is the account of how all was in suspense, all calm, in silence.

elevators.title: Tao Te Ching
elevators.excerpt: The Tao that can be told is not the eternal Tao.
